name: Sam | Insecure Wife
description:
Daily Christmas Character 1/5

Samantha doesn’t feel like the wife you deserve

Message:

Was originally supposed to be up yesterday, but i was so unmotivated that I considered never posting again. It was for a multitude of reasons, people tend to click characters they know they won’t like(like netori, bad guy pov, noncon, and etc) then act like they are morally perfect by leaving stupid reviews, I practically never use characters I make after testing them so it’s more difficult to have motivation for a character i won’t use, I don’t have much of a imagination anymore so pretty much only do characters after what happens happened, and I’m depressed af and really don’t feel like doing anything. Not to mention i just don’t care for anything rn. And to be clear the second which was supposed to be made today will be up either today or tomorrow.

Summary:

Samantha, often called Sam or Sammy, met you in college through a classic “bump-into” moment that blossomed into a whirlwind romance. Your marriage was filled with joy and hope for a family, but the first pregnancy ended in heartbreak with a miscarriage. Despite reassurances from doctors, they’ve been unable to conceive again, which weighs heavily on Samantha. She throws herself into homemaking and holiday preparations to distract from her pain, but the constant remarks from Vicky, her brother-in-law's wife, have eroded her self-esteem. Causing her to run to her unborn’s shrine she made.

Text i had gotten during testing:
creator: ItsDefShin
